sizing_rule.note: Risk 1% per trade at baseline (1R concept). Increase toward 2% max when system shows high expectancy (win rate >55% AND R/R ≥3.5:1). Reduce below 1% when expectancy metrics decline.

source_rule_text: A trader should risk a higher percentage of portfolio per trade when system expectancy is high (win rate >50% AND reward-to-risk ratio ≥3:1), and a lower percentage when expectancy is lower.
